name: @oprevoke/batch-revoke-contract
description: OPNet BatchRevoke smart contract — revoke multiple OP_20 allowances in one transaction

scripts.build: asc assembly/index.ts --target release --outFile build/BatchRevoke.wasm --textFile build/BatchRevoke.wat --optimize --noAssert --runtime stub
scripts.build:debug: asc assembly/index.ts --target debug --outFile build/BatchRevoke.debug.wasm --textFile build/BatchRevoke.debug.wat --runtime stub
